issues.description: Trigger should be 'Counter' (opponent's attack declaration with optional rest activation), not 'OnAttacked'. The card text describes a reactive ability triggered when opponent attacks, activatable by resting this card.
Condition is missing the type check. Should include 'LeaderHasType' condition checking for {Water Seven} type. Current condition only checks DON!! cost but does not gate the effect on leader type.

Duration 'EndOfTurn' is incorrect. Text says 'during this turn' which after opponent declares attack means 'DuringOpponentTurn' - the blocker effect should last through opponent's turn, not end at your turn end.

Effect missing the DON!! cost structure. Card explicitly states 'DON!! −1' as a payment cost that must be satisfied (returning 1 DON!! from field to deck). This should be represented in the DSL as a cost or prerequisite, not just in the condition.
